case_title: KOENIGSBERG, ELEC vs. BLANCHE, RAYMOND et al

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BLANCHE, RAYMOND THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 639 BUSH STREET, #62, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $1,110.64 RENT, $83.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,193.64, LEASE FORFEITED, JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFT RAYMOND BLANCHE AND EACH PERSON CLAIMING A RIGHT TO POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES. SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
